examples: Laski spent a goodly part of his lecturing life in American universities.
He said it a great many times—not a thousand times but quite a goodly number.
She was ever strict--I remember it well--a goodly wench and worthy all commendation.
This closes a goodly portion of that gap you make much of in your chart.
My gut tells me goodly chunks of liquidity stand earmarked for acquisitions of operating companies.
